title: Ship pending README improvements to primary conversion surface (Codeberg)

rationale: All external distribution lanes remain structurally blocked. The 3 pending README commits from the prior run were the highest-leverage autonomous action — direct conversion surface optimization on the primary Codeberg repo, which is the single most-visited page in the adoption funnel.
